description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the docker:latest image with a docker:dind service and defines an IMAGE_URL variable set to $CI_REGISTRY_IMAGE. Define a single stage called build. Add a Docker Build job that runs in the build stage, uses tags docker and shared, runs a before_script that logs into the GitLab Container Registry with "printf \"$CI_JOB_TOKEN\" | docker login --username gitlab-ci-token --password-stdin \"$CI_REGISTRY\"", then executes the script "./build.sh". No caches, artifacts, or conditional rules are specified.
